category_sources: Official OLSR.org page describes olsrd as a link-state routing daemon for mesh/mobile ad-hoc networks: https://www.olsr.org/
source_facts.description says it is an implementation of the Optimized Link State Routing protocol.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is titled OLSR/olsrd: https://github.com/OLSR/olsrd
docs_sources: Official OLSR.org site has a Documentation section and source links: https://www.olsr.org/
Official repository contains a doc directory: https://github.com/OLSR/olsrd/tree/master/doc
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/OLSR/olsrd; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official OLSR.org description identifies olsrd with OLSR routing and mesh/mobile ad-hoc networks.
